summary: The implementation addresses all three requirements with comprehensive changes to ImageUpload.tsx, Admin.tsx, and backend blob storage. The diff shows proper error handling, upload state tracking, form validation, and ExternalBlob integration across frontend and backend components.

hallucinated_features.description: File type validation restricting to image/* and file size validation with 10MB limit in ImageUpload.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify any validation requirements for file types or size limits. These are new validations not mentioned in REQ-1 acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Preview URL persistence using currentImageUrl prop in ImageUpload component
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention preserving or displaying existing image URLs. REQ-1 only mentions displaying selected images in preview, not existing ones.

hallucinated_features.description: Fallback image handling with '/assets/logo.dim_256x256.png' in ProductCard and ProductDetail components
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest acceptance criteria state images should be retrieved and displayed, but do not specify fallback image functionality for load errors.
